data.title: UK automotive output down 15.5% in 2025, with 764,715 vehicles produced. Industrial Strategy key to recovery.
data.description: In December and for the fiscal year 2025, car and commercial vehicle manufacturing in the UK experienced a decline in production. Data shows that vehicle production decreased by 15.5% during this period, with a total of 764,715 vehicles manufactured. High-resolution charts displaying this information are accessible through Dropbox at the provided link.

data.title: Atkore Inc. (NYSE: ATKR) declared a quarterly $0.33 per share dividend payable on Feb 27, 2026 to stockholders of record on Feb 17, 2026.
data.description: The Board of Directors of Atkore Inc. announced a cash dividend of $0.33 per share of common stock. This dividend is set to be paid on February 27, 2026, to shareholders of record as of February 17, 2026. Atkore Inc. is recognized as a key manufacturer in electrical products catering to commercial, industrial, data center, and solar applications.

data.title: Investment in Doppler's token launch protocol by Pantera Capital, funding amount undisclosed. Automated price discovery on Uniswap v4 platform.
data.description: Pantera Capital has disclosed an investment in Doppler, an automated token price discovery protocol designed for Uniswap v4. The specific amount of funding provided by Pantera Capital has not been revealed.

data.title: Ryoncil® net revenues rise to US$30M in the quarter ended December 31, 2025.
data.description: Quarterly activity report for the period ending on December 31, 2025, has been released (Appendix 4C). The report provides insights into the company's performance during this quarter, including key figures and achievements. Key numbers include revenue generated, expenses incurred, profits earned, and any noteworthy developments. The report offers a comprehensive overview of the company's operations and financial standing for this quarter.

data.title: Panel discusses power of introverted Black women for Black Introvert Week 2026 in Chicago - happening on February 7, 2026, at 10 a.m. CT.
data.description: A panel discussion for Black Introvert Week 2026 in Chicago is set to kick off with a focused topic on introverted Black women. The event titled "Depth: The Introverted Black Woman" is scheduled for Saturday, February 7, 2026, starting at 10 a.m. CT. This panel aims to shed light on the power and experiences of introverted Black women.

data.title: Halper Sadeh LLC urges PEN, RAPT, LSTA shareholders to discuss rights promptly. Investigating violations. Contact them.
data.description: Investors are encouraged to reach out to the company promptly as time may be running out to assert your rights. In a press release dated Jan. 28, 2026, Halper Sadeh LLC, a law firm specializing in investor rights, disclosed their examination of several companies for potential infractions of federal securities regulations and/or breaches of fiduciary duties. Shareholders are advised to take action swiftly to safeguard their interests.
